description.value:
Prerequisite: At least three levels in the Dedicated Hero class.

Benefit: Character gains two talents from the Dedicated hero's talent trees. The talents must be selected from the following list, and the character must meet all prerequisites: Empathic Talent Tree: Improved Aid Another or Intuition. Healing Talent Tree: Healing Touch 1 or Healing Touch 2. Insightful Talent Tree: Aware, Faith, or Cool Under Pressure.

Special: This feat may be selected multiple times. Each time it is selected, a different pair of talents must be chosen than the previous times.
